name: courseskills
description: AI course design and production skills for Codex and Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Design courses, generate slide PDFs, narrate videos, and publish course assets.
interface.longDescription: Courseskills packages AI-course creation workflows as shared skills for Codex and Claude Code: course design, image-page slide decks, OpenAI API slide generation, narration-to-video assembly, and course video publishing helpers.
defaultPrompt: Design an AI course syllabus with lessons and projects.
Create a course handout, slide images, and PDF deck.
Turn this generated slide deck into a narrated video.
